inputDescription: Paste the networks to combine, then optionally subtract networks that should not remain in the result.
mergeDescription: One CIDR per line, or comma-separated. Overlapping and adjacent blocks are collapsed first.
excludeDescription: These CIDRs are removed after the merge. IPv4 and IPv6 exclusions only affect their own family.
resultDescription: Minimal CIDR blocks after the merged ranges are normalized and exclusions are applied.
emptyDescription: Paste one or more CIDR blocks in the merge list to calculate the resulting network set.
missingMergeDescription: Add at least one CIDR block to the merge list before using exclusions.
invalidDescription: Use valid IPv4 or IPv6 CIDR notation such as 10.0.0.0/24 or 2001:db8::/32.
noCidrsDescription: The excluded networks fully covered the merged set, so there is no resulting CIDR block to copy.
